title: e-Discovery
content:
Increasing efficiency. Reducing costs. All Under One Roof.

### Preservation to Production
- Guiding you painlessly through the preservation, collection, processing and analysis of evidence
- Using technology including predictive coding, continuous active learning, conceptual clustering and categorization
- Conducting targeted collections to dramatically reduce the number of records for review
- Ensuring document reviews are completed efficiently and within fee estimates
- Assembling scalable teams quickly to respond to urgent requests for litigation, investigation or regulatory reviews

### Applying E-discovery Technology
- Offering a full in-house solution: we have extensive experience and technology working with the full range of e-discovery tools and review platforms
- Providing specialized evidence assessment and guidance
- Guaranteeing an approach that helps focus your legal team on the key documents, and adds significant value to the evidentiary record

### Proportionality, Affidavits, Expert Advice
- Offering extensive knowledge of e-discovery related case law, and experience appearing before all levels of court

### Best Practice Guidelines
- Providing the most current advice on legal and regulatory standards and guidelines, including preparing litigation readiness plans and legal hold policies and strategies, and precedents
